recent_bad_license_projects.name: fiftyone-pipeline-engines
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: This package extends the flow element class created by the fiftyone-pipeline-core package into a specialized type of flow element called an engine.
recent_bad_license_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_bad_license_projects.name: fiftyone-pipeline-engines-fiftyone
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: The 51Degrees Pipeline API is a generic web request intelligence and data processing solution with the ability to add a range of 51Degrees and/or custom plug ins (Engines). It includes a ShareUsage engine that sends usage data to 51Degrees in zipped batches.
recent_bad_license_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_bad_license_projects.name: fiftyone-pipeline-core
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: This package defines the essential components of the 51Degrees Pipeline API such as flow elements, flow data and evidence. It also packages together JavaScript served by a pipeline and allows for client side requests for additional data populated by evidence from the client side.
recent_bad_license_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_bad_license_projects.name: fiftyone-pipeline-cloudrequestengine
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: This package contains a shared engine that is used to make requests to the 51Degrees cloud service on behalf of other data services such as device detection or location.
recent_bad_license_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_bad_license_projects.name: cipipeline
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: CIPipeline is a tool to analyze and process Calcium Imaging data.

recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: Adam Filipek

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: fiftyone-pipeline-engines
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: This package extends the flow element class created by the fiftyone-pipeline-core package into a specialized type of flow element called an engine.
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: fiftyone-pipeline-engines-fiftyone
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: The 51Degrees Pipeline API is a generic web request intelligence and data processing solution with the ability to add a range of 51Degrees and/or custom plug ins (Engines). It includes a ShareUsage engine that sends usage data to 51Degrees in zipped batches.
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: fiftyone-pipeline-core
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: This package defines the essential components of the 51Degrees Pipeline API such as flow elements, flow data and evidence. It also packages together JavaScript served by a pipeline and allows for client side requests for additional data populated by evidence from the client side.
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: fiftyone-pipeline-cloudrequestengine
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: This package contains a shared engine that is used to make requests to the 51Degrees cloud service on behalf of other data services such as device detection or location.
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: fiftyone-location
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: 51Degrees Geolocation performs reverse geocoding (using longitude and latitude information) to populate postal addresses.
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering
